response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience, but the role explicitly requires a senior C++ developer with deep STL, multi-threading, message-broker, IoT/MQTT, and IEC 62443 industrial cybersecurity expertise. C++ exposure is limited to a brief stint at National Instruments (Dec 2014 – Jun 2015) over a decade ago, and the resume shows no industrial automation, MQTT, secure SDL, or relevant protocol background. The bulk of recent work is Node.js/TypeScript/DLang, which does not align with the core technical competencies required.
strengths: 12+ years of software engineering across web, mobile, desktop and embedded contexts
Strong testing/TDD culture and mentoring/workshop experience aligns with team-mentoring duties
Some networked, high-throughput, low-latency systems experience (Dunnhumby/Sociomantic)
concerns: Minimal and dated C++/STL experience — only ~6 months at NI over 10 years ago
No demonstrated experience with IEC 62443, Secure Development Lifecycle, or industrial cybersecurity
No exposure to MQTT, Modbus, OPC UA, message brokers, or industrial automation/IoT platforms

key_factors.factor: Broad senior engineering and mentoring experience
